issue_title: Option useCss in combination Bootstrap v5 results in no pdf borders between rows
issue_body_preview:
When using `useCss`, the AutoTable plugin seems to rely on checking `border-top-width` for setting the `lineWidth`.

This works in Bootstrap v4.6 which used border-top for row separators but Bootstrap v5 now seems to use border-bottom which causes the PDF to be output with no row borders.

The a
test_description_zh: 在使用 Bootstrap v5 样式的 HTML 表格中，启用 jsPDF-AutoTable 的 useCss 选项生成 PDF，检查 PDF 中表格行之间的边框是否正常渲染。
expected_result_zh: 生成的 PDF 中表格各行之间应正确显示边框分隔线，与 Bootstrap v5 页面上表格的行边框表现一致，不会出现行边框缺失的情况。
